provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, petite japanese woman in her 30s with her hair in a tight ponytail and a calm methodical demeanor, wearing a green-grey environmental systems jumpsuit with air quality patches on the shoulders, a portable atmospheric analyzer in a belt holster, a thin respirator mask pushed down around her neck, soft-soled shoes for crawling through ventilation ducts, the jumpsuit has dust from air filtration systems permanently embedded in the fabric

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
